prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-WHEAT-PEELER-YJJ-74605-72 Product Type: BLADED_FOOD_PEELER Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Cream Stainless Steel Wheat Straw Vegetable Peeler Kitchen Utensils Description: Whether batch peeling for mashed potatoes, a few carrots for an afternoon snack, or perfect parmesan shavings to top a refreshing salad, look no further than Beille’s wheat straw vegetable peeler. This particular Y peeler comes with a straight blade for all kinds of kitchen peeling tasks. In addition, this vegetable peeler also features a thick, rounded handle with a speckled matte finish, ensuring a comfortable and controlled grip when peeling.

Made from wheat straw, a bioplastic, the construction is an alternative plant-based material to other less forgiving solid plastics; renewable and sustainable, Beille’s vegetable peeler is of course food-safe and certified BPA Free; it also features a built-in handle hole for hanging storage if preferred. The peeler is also dishwasher safe making for a quick and easy cleanup.

Easy to use, comfortable, and efficient, Beille’s wheat straw vegetable peeler is a must-have in your arsenal of kitchen gadgets; Beille’s vegetable peeler allows for smooth, frictionless peeling and maneuvers well around nooks and crannies.

Upgrade your current garlic peeler to a sustainable one, or gift one as a hostess or housewarming gift alongside other items from Beille’s wheat straw kitchen collection. Search Terms: y peeler wheat straw baking supplies tools cooking chef restaurant equipment sustainable products bake food meal prep kitchen starter set wedding house warming gifts new home college dorm room essentials home goods kitchen utensils Features: - VEGETABLE PEELER - Vegetables, fruit, potatoes, and more, the Beille peeler can handle it all! The wheat straw vegetable peeler comes with a straight blade for all kinds of peeling tasks; the peeler also features a thick, rounded handle with a speckled matte finish, ensuring a comfortable and controlled grip - WHEAT STRAW - Beille’s peeler is made of bioplastic wheat straw, an alternative plant-based material to other less forgiving solid plastics; renewable and sustainable, Beille’s vegetable peeler is food safe and certified BPA Free; it also features a built-in handle hole for hanging storage if preferred - KITCHEN GADGETS - No kitchen is complete without a y-peeler! A must-have home and kitchen tool, upgrade your current garlic peeler to a sustainable one, or gift one as a hostess or housewarming gift alongside other items from Beille’s wheat straw kitchen collection - DISHWASHER SAFE - Beille’s wheat straw vegetable peeler mimics similar plastic kitchen tools but without harmful byproducts; the fruit peeler is top-rack dishwasher safe, making for a quick and easy cleanup! - SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: plant-based wheat straw, stainless steel; Colors: beige, chrome; BPA free: yes; Dimensions: === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
